suite.name: testeIF

test.name: CT01: Validar Acesso Permitido com Aceite Valido

kw.name: Abrir Navegador Na Tela De Login
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Is
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select Checkbox
kw.doc: Selects the checkbox identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Is
kw.msg: UnexpectedAlertPresentException: Alert Text: Avaliação Concluída! Perfil: ATIVO_LEVE Message: unexpected alert open: {Alert text : Avaliação Concluída! kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Testa a partição válida usando o primeiro usuário.
test.status: UnexpectedAlertPresentException: Alert Text: Avaliação Concluída! Perfil: ATIVO_LEVE Message: unexpected alert open: {Alert text : Avaliação Concluída! Perfil: ATIVO_LEVE} (Session info: MicrosoftEdge=149.0.4022.69) Stacktrace: msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff78c596925+e305] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff78c596984+e364] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff78cc188fa+6902da] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff78bfc9f41] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff78bf8485c] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff78bf83ab6] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff78bf84683] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff78c1d2ca1] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff78c1cf3f8] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff78c1dfe85] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff78c5b28d1+2a2b1] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff78c5bb676+33056] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff78c59e3e4+15dc4] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff78c59e505+15ee5] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff78c58ab13+24f3] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffa165c53e0+10] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffa17f2485b+2b]

test.name: CT02: Validar Acesso Bloqueado com Aceite Invalido

kw.name: Abrir Navegador Na Tela De Login
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Is
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'css=[data-testid="quiz-error-message"]' contains exact text 'É obrigatório aceitar o aviso de responsabilidade médica para prosseguir.'.
kw.arg: É obrigatório aceitar o aviso de responsabilidade médica para prosseguir.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Testa a partição inválida usando o segundo usuário.

suite.doc: Suite de testes para a tela de aceite do aviso medico.
